title: AMIE (Associate Member of the Institution of Engineers) Certification
description: A professional certification in engineering offered by the Institution of Engineers (India), considered equivalent to a B.E./B.Tech. degree.

title: JAIIB/CAIIB Certification
description: Professional examinations (Junior Associate/Certified Associate of the Indian Institute of Bankers) for banking professionals in India to acquire foundational and advanced banking knowledge for career progression.

title: National Apprenticeship Certificate (NAC)
description: A one-year certification awarded after successful completion of apprenticeship training in a designated trade, often done in PSUs or private industries.

title: B.A. LL.B. (Hons.)
description: A five-year integrated undergraduate degree program combining Bachelor of Arts and Bachelor of Laws with honours.

title: B.Arch (Bachelor of Architecture)
description: Five-year undergraduate architecture degree; admission via NATA or JEE Main Paper 2; leads to Council of Architecture registration and practice.

title: B.B.A. LL.B. (Hons.)
description: A five-year integrated undergraduate degree program combining Bachelor of Business Administration and Bachelor of Laws with honours.

title: B.Com (Bachelor of Commerce)
description: Three-year undergraduate commerce degree covering accounting, finance, taxation and business law; pairs naturally with CA/CS/CMA and management routes.

title: B.Com (Hons.)
description: An undergraduate commerce degree with a specialized focus on subjects like accounting, finance, or economics.

title: B.Com. LL.B. (Hons.)
description: A five-year integrated undergraduate degree program combining Bachelor of Commerce and Bachelor of Laws with honours.

title: B.Des (Bachelor of Design)
description: A four-year undergraduate degree in various design specializations like product, fashion, graphic, or industrial design.

title: B.Ed. (Bachelor of Education)
description: A one-to-two-year professional degree that prepares students for work as teachers in schools.

title: B.F.A. (Bachelor of Fine Arts)
description: An undergraduate degree focused on the creative practices and theories of visual and performing arts, such as painting, sculpture, or photography.

title: B.F.Sc. (Bachelor of Fisheries Science)
description: An undergraduate degree program focused on the study of fish breeding, genetics, biotechnology, nutrition, farming, and diagnosis of diseases.

title: B.F.Tech (Bachelor of Fashion Technology)
description: An undergraduate degree focusing on the technological and managerial aspects of apparel production and the fashion industry.

title: B.Pharm (Bachelor of Pharmacy)
description: Four-year undergraduate pharmacy degree; leads to pharmacist licensure, pharma industry roles, and M.Pharm.

title: B.Plan (Bachelor of Planning)
description: A four-year undergraduate professional degree program focused on urban planning, regional planning, and resource management.

title: B.S.W. LL.B. (Hons.)
description: A five-year integrated undergraduate degree program combining Bachelor of Social Work and Bachelor of Laws with honours, focusing on social justice and human rights law.

title: B.Sc (Bachelor of Science)
description: Three-to-four-year undergraduate science degree across physical, life, and applied sciences; leads to M.Sc, research, teaching and applied-sector roles.

title: B.Sc. (Hons.) Agriculture
description: A four-year undergraduate degree program focusing on agricultural science, research, and modern farming techniques.

title: B.Sc. (Hons.) Community Science
description: An undergraduate degree focusing on family and community well-being through nutrition, resource management, and human development, formerly known as Home Science.

title: B.Sc. (Hons.) Forestry
description: An undergraduate degree focused on the science and practice of managing forests, tree plantations, and related natural resources.

title: B.Sc. (Hons.) Horticulture
description: An undergraduate degree specializing in the science of plant cultivation, including fruits, vegetables, flowers, and ornamental plants.

title: B.Sc. in Fashion Design
description: An undergraduate science degree focusing on the technical and aesthetic aspects of fashion design, textiles, and apparel manufacturing, often offered by various universities.

title: B.Sc. in Hospitality and Hotel Administration
description: A three-year undergraduate degree focusing on the management and operational aspects of hotels and the hospitality industry.

title: B.Sc. in Interior Design
description: A three-year undergraduate degree focusing on the art and science of enhancing the interior of a building to achieve a healthier and more aesthetically pleasing environment for the people using the space.

title: B.Sc. LL.B. (Hons.)
description: A five-year integrated undergraduate degree program combining Bachelor of Science and Bachelor of Laws with honours, often specializing in intellectual property or cyber law.

title: B.Sc. Nursing
description: A four-year undergraduate program that trains students in patient care, healthcare management, and medical assistance.

title: B.Tech (Bachelor of Technology)
description: Four-year undergraduate engineering degree; admission mainly via JEE Main/Advanced or state CETs; branches include CSE, ECE, Mechanical, Civil and more.

title: B.Tech in Agricultural Engineering
description: An undergraduate engineering degree focusing on applying engineering principles to agricultural practices, machinery, and processing.

title: B.Tech in Biotechnology
description: An undergraduate engineering degree that applies biological systems and organisms to develop or create different products for agriculture, food, and medicine.

title: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering
description: A four-year undergraduate degree program focusing on the principles of computer science, programming, algorithms, and software and hardware development.

title: B.Tech in Dairy Technology
description: An undergraduate engineering degree focused on the science and technology of milk processing and the production of dairy products.

title: B.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering
description: A four-year undergraduate degree program focused on the design, development, and testing of electronic equipment used in various systems and communication.

title: B.Tech in Food Technology
description: An undergraduate engineering degree that deals with the techniques and principles involved in processing, preserving, and packaging food.

title: B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering
description: A four-year undergraduate degree program that applies principles of engineering, physics, and materials science for the design, analysis, manufacturing, and maintenance of mechanical systems.

title: B.Tech + M.Tech Dual Degree
description: An integrated five-year program combining a Bachelor of Technology and a Master of Technology degree, offered by premier engineering institutes like IITs.

title: B.V.Sc & A.H. (Bachelor of Veterinary Science & Animal Husbandry)
description: An undergraduate degree program for the study of veterinary medicine and animal husbandry, for which NEET-UG is the primary entrance exam.

title: B.Voc (Bachelor of Vocation)
description: An undergraduate degree program focusing on skill development and practical training in a specific vocational field.

title: BA (Bachelor of Arts)
description: Three-year undergraduate humanities/social-science degree; a base for civil services, law, media, academia, and public policy.

title: Bachelor of Business Economics (BBE)
description: An undergraduate degree focusing on the application of economic principles to business decision-making.

title: Bachelor of Financial and Investment Analysis (BFIA)
description: An undergraduate degree specializing in financial markets, investment strategies, and portfolio management.

title: Bachelor of Science (Research)
description: A four-year undergraduate research-focused science program, offered by institutions like IISc Bangalore, leading to a BS degree with a strong emphasis on research projects.

title: Bachelor of Tourism and Travel Management (BTTM)
description: An undergraduate degree focusing on the management of tourism and travel businesses, including tour operations and destination management.

title: Bachelor's Degree (Distance Learning)
description: A three or four-year undergraduate degree pursued through correspondence or open university systems, allowing for flexible learning while working.

title: Bachelor's Degree (IGNOU Defence Personnel Scheme)
description: A special undergraduate degree program from IGNOU for defence personnel, including Agniveers, that recognizes in-service training for academic credits.

title: BAMS (Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery)
description: An undergraduate degree program that combines traditional Ayurvedic medicine with modern medical sciences, with admission based on NEET-UG scores.

title: BBA (Bachelor of Business Administration)
description: Three-year undergraduate management degree; a feeder to MBA and entry-level corporate roles.

title: BBA in Hotel Management
description: A three-year undergraduate business degree specializing in the principles and practices of hotel and hospitality management.

title: BCA (Bachelor of Computer Applications)
description: Three-year undergraduate computing degree; leads to software roles or MCA.

title: BDS (Bachelor of Dental Surgery)
description: Five-year undergraduate dental degree (including internship); admission via NEET-UG; leads to clinical dentistry or MDS specialization.

title: BHMS (Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery)
description: An undergraduate degree program focused on the holistic system of homeopathic medicine, with admission based on NEET-UG scores.

title: BPT (Bachelor of Physiotherapy)
description: An undergraduate program focused on physical therapy to treat disease, injury, or deformity by physical methods.

title: BS in Medical Sciences and Engineering
description: A four-year undergraduate program focusing on the intersection of medical sciences and engineering disciplines, offered by institutions like IIT Madras.

title: BS-MS Dual Degree
description: A five-year integrated program in science, culminating in both a Bachelor of Science and a Master of Science degree, primarily offered by IISERs.

title: Executive MBA
description: A one-year MBA program designed for working professionals with significant prior work experience.

title: FPM (Fellow Programme in Management)
description: A doctoral-level program in management offered by premier institutions like IIMs, equivalent to a Ph.D., for those aspiring to careers in academia or research.

title: Integrated M.Sc. (BITS)
description: A five-year dual degree program offered by BITS Pilani, combining a Master of Science in a fundamental science with a Bachelor of Engineering.

title: Integrated M.Sc.-Ph.D.
description: A dual degree program seamlessly combining a Master of Science with a Doctor of Philosophy, offered at premier institutes like IISc and IITs.

title: LL.M. (Master of Laws)
description: A postgraduate degree in law pursued after an undergraduate law degree, for which admission to NLUs is through the CLAT-PG paper.

title: LLB (Bachelor of Laws)
description: Law degree — 5-year integrated (BA LLB/BBA LLB via CLAT) after Class 12 or 3-year LLB after graduation; the gateway to litigation, corporate law and the judiciary.

title: M.Arch (Master of Architecture)
description: A two-year postgraduate degree program focusing on advanced architectural design, theory, and specialized areas like conservation, urban design, or landscape architecture.

title: M.Com (Master of Commerce)
description: A two-year postgraduate degree providing in-depth knowledge in commerce, accounting, finance, and taxation.

title: M.Des (Master of Design)
description: A two-year postgraduate degree focusing on advanced and specialized areas of design, such as interaction design, product design, or transportation design.

title: M.Ed. (Master of Education)
description: A postgraduate academic master's degree in education, focusing on advanced pedagogical theory, practice, and research.

title: M.Pharm (Master of Pharmacy)
description: A postgraduate degree in pharmacy that provides specialized knowledge in areas like pharmaceutics, pharmacology, pharmaceutical chemistry, and pharmacognosy.

title: M.Plan (Master of Planning)
description: A postgraduate degree focusing on the design and management of urban and regional environments, including land use, transportation, and infrastructure.

title: M.Sc. in Agriculture
description: A postgraduate degree focusing on advanced topics in agricultural science, research, and specialized farming practices.

title: M.Sc. in Biotechnology
description: A two-year postgraduate program focusing on the application of biological systems for technological and industrial purposes, offered by IITs and NITs.

title: M.Sc. in Earth Sciences
description: A postgraduate degree program covering geology, geophysics, and other related fields concerning the Earth, with admission through the JAM Geology paper.

title: M.Sc. in Economics
description: A two-year postgraduate degree program in Economics offered by select IITs through the JAM Economics paper.

title: M.Sc. in Interior Design
description: A postgraduate degree focusing on advanced concepts and research in interior design, often specializing in areas like sustainable design, lighting, or furniture design.

title: M.Sc. (Master of Science)
description: A two-year postgraduate degree program in foundational sciences like Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics, offered by IITs, NITs, and IISc.

title: M.Sc. Nursing
description: A two-year postgraduate degree program offering specialization in various fields of nursing like Medical-Surgical, Community Health, or Obstetrics & Gynaecology.

title: M.Tech in Computer Science
description: A postgraduate degree focusing on advanced topics in computer science and engineering, often pursued for specialization or to enter research.

title: M.Voc (Master of Vocation)
description: A postgraduate degree program that builds upon vocational skills and knowledge acquired at the undergraduate level, focusing on advanced practical training and specialization.

title: MA (Master of Arts)
description: A two-year postgraduate degree program offering specialization in various subjects within the humanities, social sciences, and fine arts.

title: Master of Business Administration (Abroad)
description: A Master of Business Administration degree from a business school outside India that accepts GRE scores for admission.

title: Master of Public Health (MPH)
description: A postgraduate degree focusing on the science and art of preventing disease, prolonging life, and promoting health through organized community efforts.

title: Master of Public Policy (Abroad)
description: A graduate degree program focusing on public policy analysis and implementation from a university outside India.

title: MBA (Master of Business Administration)
description: Two-year postgraduate management degree; admission via CAT/XAT/GMAT and others; the standard credential for management, consulting and finance careers.

title: MBA in Agri-Business Management
description: A specialized MBA program focusing on the business aspects of agriculture production, processing, and its international trade.

title: MBBS (Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery)
description: 5.5-year undergraduate medical degree including internship; admission via NEET-UG; the gateway to clinical practice and postgraduate medical specialization.

title: MBBS from a foreign university
description: A primary medical qualification obtained from a university outside India, for which passing NEET-UG is a mandatory eligibility criterion for Indian students.

title: MCA (Master of Computer Applications)
description: A two-year postgraduate degree program in computer applications designed to meet the growing demand for qualified professionals in the field of IT.

title: MPT (Master of Physiotherapy)
description: A postgraduate degree program focusing on advanced knowledge and skills in physiotherapy practice, research, and specialized clinical areas.

title: MS in Computer Science (Abroad)
description: A Master of Science degree in Computer Science or related fields from a university outside India, typically in the USA, Canada, or Europe.

title: MS in Engineering (Abroad)
description: A Master of Science degree in various engineering disciplines (such as Mechanical, Electrical, Civil) from a university outside India.

title: MSW (Master of Social Work)
description: A two-year postgraduate degree program focused on social work, community development, and public welfare administration.

title: Ph.D. in Computer Science
description: A doctoral research degree focused on advancing knowledge in the field of computer science through original research, culminating in a dissertation.

title: Ph.D. in Science
description: A doctoral degree involving original research in a scientific field, pursued after a Master's degree, often funded by a Junior Research Fellowship (JRF).

title: Ph.D. in STEM (Abroad)
description: A doctoral program in Science, Technology, Engineering, or Mathematics at a university outside India, often pursued directly after a bachelor's degree.

title: Diploma in Architectural Assistantship
description: A diploma program that trains students to assist architects in preparing drawings, models, and managing projects.

title: Diploma in Bakery and Confectionery
description: A specialized one-year diploma focusing on the skills and techniques required for professional baking and pastry arts.

title: Diploma in Elementary Education (D.El.Ed.)
description: A two-year diploma course for training individuals to become primary school teachers.

title: Diploma in Fashion Design
description: A 1-3 year vocational program focusing on the practical skills of garment design and construction, offered by polytechnics and private institutes.

title: Diploma in Food Production
description: A specialized diploma program of 1 to 1.5 years focusing on culinary skills, food preparation, and kitchen management.

title: Diploma in Hotel Management
description: A short-term program, typically 1-2 years, providing foundational knowledge and practical skills in hotel operations.

title: Diploma in Paramedical Sciences
description: A short-term program providing training in allied healthcare fields like medical lab technology, radiography, or operation theatre technology.

title: PGDM (Post Graduate Diploma in Management)
description: A two-year postgraduate diploma in management offered by autonomous business schools in India, often considered equivalent to an MBA.

title: PGP in Management
description: A flagship two-year Post Graduate Programme in Management, the primary degree offered by IIMs, leading to an MBA equivalent.

title: Polytechnic Diploma (Engineering)
description: Three-year state-board engineering diploma after Class 10; leads to junior engineer roles or lateral entry into the second year of B.E./B.Tech.

title: Post Graduate Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology (PGDMLT)
description: A postgraduate diploma program focusing on advanced techniques and management skills for medical laboratory professionals.

title: Agribusiness Entrepreneurship
description: Starting a private enterprise in the agriculture sector, such as a high-tech farm, food processing unit, agri-input supply, or consultancy service.

title: Architectural Drafting and Design Services
description: Establishing a freelance business or small firm that provides specialized services like architectural drafting, 2D/3D modeling, and creating submission drawings for building approvals.

title: Architectural Firm Entrepreneurship
description: Establishing and running a private practice or consultancy offering architectural design, planning, and project management services.

title: Diagnostic Lab Entrepreneurship
description: Establishing and managing a private diagnostic laboratory or collection center for services like blood tests, urine analysis, and other sample processing.

title: Freelance Digital Marketing Consultant
description: An independent professional offering digital marketing services and strategic advice to multiple clients on a project basis.

title: Interior Design Firm Entrepreneurship
description: Starting and managing a business that provides interior design services to residential, commercial, or institutional clients.

title: Medium-Scale Manufacturing Entrepreneurship
description: Owning and operating a medium-sized manufacturing or industrial service company, involving larger teams, complex machinery, and wider market reach.

title: Pharmacy Entrepreneurship
description: Owning and operating a licensed retail pharmacy or wholesale drug business to dispense or distribute medicines and healthcare products.

title: Physiotherapy Clinic Entrepreneurship
description: Establishing and managing a private practice or clinic to provide physiotherapy services directly to clients.

title: Planning Consultancy Entrepreneurship
description: Establishing a private firm that provides professional services in urban planning, regional planning, environmental impact assessment, and policy advisory.

title: Playschool Entrepreneurship
description: Starting and managing one's own pre-school, daycare, or early learning center for young children.

title: Small Business Entrepreneurship
description: Founding and managing a small-scale business venture, often leveraging personal skills, capital, and local market opportunities.

title: Start a Digital Marketing Agency
description: Founds and operates a business that provides a range of digital marketing services to other companies.

title: Tech Startup Founder
description: An individual who establishes a new business venture in the technology sector, focusing on innovative products or services and aiming for high growth.

title: Technical Services Entrepreneurship
description: Starting a business that provides technical services, repairs, or small-scale manufacturing based on engineering diploma skills.

title: ACET
description: ACET — professional exam (finance), conducted by Institute of Actuaries of India. entry to IAI actuarial exams.

title: AFCAT
description: AFCAT — govt recruitment exam (defence), conducted by Indian Air Force.

description: TS EAMCET (TG EAPCET) — ug entrance exam (engineering), conducted by JNTU Hyderabad / TSCHE.

title: UCEED
description: UCEED — ug entrance exam (design), conducted by IIT Bombay.

title: UGC-NET
description: UGC-NET — eligibility exam (general), conducted by NTA. Assistant Professor eligibility + JRF.

title: UPSC CAPF (AC)
description: UPSC CAPF (AC) — govt recruitment exam (defence), conducted by UPSC.

title: UPSC CDS
description: UPSC CDS — govt recruitment exam (defence), conducted by UPSC.

title: UPSC Civil Services Examination
description: UPSC Civil Services Examination — govt recruitment exam (general), conducted by UPSC. IAS/IPS/IFS and allied services.

title: UPSC Engineering Services Examination (ESE/IES)
description: UPSC Engineering Services Examination (ESE/IES) — govt recruitment exam (engineering), conducted by UPSC.

title: UPSC Indian Forest Service Examination
description: UPSC Indian Forest Service Examination — govt recruitment exam (general), conducted by UPSC.

title: UPSC NDA & NA
description: UPSC NDA & NA — govt recruitment exam (defence), conducted by UPSC.

title: USMLE (Steps 1–3)
description: USMLE (Steps 1–3) — abroad exam (medical), conducted by FSMB / NBME.

title: VITEEE
description: VITEEE — ug entrance exam (engineering), conducted by VIT.

title: WBJEE
description: WBJEE — ug entrance exam (engineering), conducted by WBJEEB.

title: XAT
description: XAT — pg entrance exam (management), conducted by XLRI.

title: Administrative Assistant (DRDO)
description: A clerical role within DRDO responsible for general administrative duties, record keeping, and office management, often filled through the CEPTAM Admin & Allied cadre.

title: Assistant Loco Pilot (Indian Railways)
description: An entry-level position in the Indian Railways responsible for assisting the train driver (loco pilot) in train operations.

title: Assistant Section Officer in Central Secretariat Service (CSS)
description: A Group B non-gazetted post in various central government ministries, responsible for administrative and policy-related work.

title: Assistant Town Planner
description: An entry-level government position responsible for assisting in the planning and regulation of urban and rural development projects within a municipality or state.

title: Auditor in Comptroller and Auditor General (CAG)
description: A Group C post responsible for auditing the accounts of central and state government departments and public sector undertakings.

title: Community Health Officer
description: A healthcare professional under the National Health Mission (NHM) who leads a team at a Health and Wellness Centre, providing primary healthcare services to the community.

title: Constable (General Duty) in CAPFs
description: An entry-level security role in India's Central Armed Police Forces (e.g., BSF, CISF, CRPF), secured through the SSC GD exam.

title: Data Entry Operator (DEO)
description: A clerical post responsible for entering, updating, and maintaining data in computer systems for various government organizations, such as the C&AG.

title: Drug Inspector
description: A government official who inspects establishments manufacturing or selling drugs and cosmetics to ensure they comply with safety and quality standards.

title: Government Architect
description: An architect employed by central or state government bodies like CPWD, PWD, or municipal corporations to work on public infrastructure projects.

title: Government Physiotherapist
description: A physiotherapist employed in public sector hospitals, community health centers, or other government healthcare facilities.

title: Group A Officer (Allied Civil Services)
description: An officer in various Group A central government services like the Indian Audit and Accounts Service (IA&AS) or Indian Corporate Law Service (ICLS), recruited via the UPSC CSE.

title: Head Constable in CAPFs
description: The first promotional rank for a Constable in the Central Armed Police Forces, achieved through internal examinations and seniority.

title: Indian Administrative Service (IAS) Officer
description: An officer of the premier civil service of the Government of India, responsible for public administration and policy implementation.

title: Indian Foreign Service (IFS) Officer
description: A diplomat representing India's interests abroad, working in embassies, consulates, and international organizations.

title: Indian Police Service (IPS) Officer
description: An officer responsible for law enforcement, public order, and internal security at the state and central levels.

title: Indian Revenue Service (IRS) Officer
description: An officer responsible for the collection and administration of direct and indirect taxes for the Government of India.

title: Inspector of Income Tax in CBDT
description: A Group C post responsible for assessing, verifying, and processing income tax records and conducting raids.

title: Judge Advocate General (JAG) Entry Scheme
description: A recruitment scheme for law graduates to join the Indian Army's legal branch as commissioned officers.

title: Junior Engineer (Central Government)
description: A Group-B non-gazetted technical post in various ministries, departments and organisations of the Government of India, recruited through the SSC JE exam.

title: Junior Engineer (Indian Railways)
description: A technical role in the Indian Railways responsible for assisting in the planning, execution, and maintenance of various engineering projects and systems.

title: Junior Engineer (State Government)
description: A role in a state government department (e.g., PWD, Irrigation) focusing on project execution, supervision, and maintenance tasks.

title: Junior Statistical Officer (JSO)
description: A specialized Group B post responsible for data collection, compilation, and analysis in the Ministry of Statistics and Programme Implementation.

title: Legal Officer in a PSU
description: A role in the legal department of a Public Sector Undertaking, for which recruitment is sometimes based on CLAT-PG scores.

title: Lower Divisional Clerk/Junior Secretariat Assistant (LDC/JSA)
aliases: Lower Divisional Clerk  |  Junior Secretariat Assistant (LDC | JSA)
description: An entry-level clerical post in central government ministries responsible for routine office tasks, data maintenance, and correspondence.

title: Military Nursing Officer
description: A commissioned officer in the Military Nursing Service (MNS) of the Indian Armed Forces, providing nursing care to military personnel and their families.

title: Multi-Tasking Staff (Central Government)
description: A Group C non-technical post in various central government ministries, departments, and offices, responsible for general clerical support and subordinate duties.

title: Nursing Officer (Government)
description: A registered nurse employed in central or state government healthcare facilities (e.g., AIIMS, ESIC, Railways) through competitive recruitment exams.

title: Paramedic (Government)
description: A role as a paramedic or technician in state or central government hospitals, clinics, and health departments, typically secured through state-level recruitment exams.

title: Police Constable (State Police)
description: A law enforcement officer in a state's police force, responsible for maintaining law and order, patrolling, and responding to incidents.

title: Postal Assistant/Sorting Assistant (PA/SA)
description: An operational role in the Department of Posts, responsible for customer service at counters, mail sorting, and related administrative tasks.

title: Probationary Officer (Public Sector Bank)
description: An entry-level officer position in a public sector bank in India, responsible for general banking operations and customer service during a probationary period.

title: Security Assistant (DRDO)
description: A security role within DRDO responsible for physical security, access control, and safeguarding of sensitive information and assets.

title: Senior Technical Assistant (DRDO)
description: A Group 'B' Non-Gazetted, Non-Ministerial technical role in the Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO) responsible for assisting scientists and engineers in research and development projects.

title: Sepoy (Indian Army)
description: A permanent enlisted soldier in the Indian Army, serving beyond the initial Agnipath scheme tenure.

title: Stenographer (Government)
description: A government role responsible for transcribing spoken words by typing them into a steno machine, providing secretarial and clerical support.

title: Store Assistant (DRDO)
description: A role within DRDO responsible for managing inventory, procurement, and distribution of materials and equipment required for research and other activities.

title: Sub Inspector in Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI)
description: A Group B post responsible for investigating corruption, economic offenses, and other major crimes at a national level.

title: Tax Assistant in CBDT
description: An entry-level Group C clerical post in the Central Board of Direct Taxes responsible for record maintenance and assisting senior officers in tax administration.

title: Technician (DRDO)
description: A Group 'C' Non-Gazetted, Non-Ministerial technical role in the Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO) responsible for operating and maintaining laboratory equipment and assisting in technical tasks.

title: Technician (Indian Railways)
description: A technical role in various departments of the Indian Railways responsible for maintenance, repair, and operation of railway equipment.

title: Vocational Instructor (Government ITI)
description: A government employee who teaches trade-specific skills and theory at an Industrial Training Institute (ITI) or other government vocational centers.

title: Accountant
description: A professional responsible for maintaining financial records, preparing reports, and ensuring tax compliance for an organization.

title: Agniveer (Indian Air Force)
description: An airman (Agniveervayu) serving a four-year tour of duty in the Indian Air Force under the Agnipath scheme.

title: Agniveer (Indian Army)
description: A soldier serving a four-year tour of duty in the Indian Army under the Agnipath scheme.

title: Agniveer (Indian Navy)
description: A sailor serving a four-year tour of duty in the Indian Navy under the Agnipath scheme.

title: Agricultural Field Officer (Public Sector Bank)
description: A specialist officer in public sector banks responsible for assessing and managing agricultural loans and rural credit, typically recruited via IBPS SO exam.

title: Architect
description: A professional licensed to plan, design, and oversee the construction of buildings, after registering with the Council of Architecture (CoA).

title: Architectural Assistant
description: Assists architects in preparing drawings, models, and project documents for building design and construction projects.

title: Area Sales Manager
description: A first-level management role responsible for leading a team of medical representatives and achieving sales targets within a specific geographical territory.

title: Assistant Professor
description: An entry-level university or college faculty member responsible for teaching and research, for which CSIR-NET is an eligibility criterion.

title: Content Writer
description: A professional who creates written material for websites, blogs, social media, and marketing campaigns.

title: Corporate Counsel
description: An in-house lawyer employed by a company to handle its legal matters, including contracts, compliance, mergers, and acquisitions.

title: Corporate Security Personnel
description: A professional responsible for safeguarding a company's assets, employees, and property against theft, violence, or other threats.

title: Data Scientist
description: A professional who uses scientific methods, processes, algorithms, and systems to extract knowledge and insights from structured and unstructured data.

title: Database Administrator
description: An IT professional responsible for the installation, configuration, upgrading, administration, monitoring, maintenance, and security of databases in an organization.

title: Digital Marketing Manager
description: Leads a team of marketing specialists and oversees the overall digital marketing strategy for a company.

title: Digital Marketing Specialist
description: A professional responsible for developing, implementing and managing marketing campaigns that promote a company and its products and services online.

title: Diploma Engineer Trainee (PSU)
description: A trainee role in a Public Sector Undertaking for diploma holders, focusing on on-the-job training in engineering operations and maintenance.

title: Educational Content Developer
description: A professional who creates instructional materials, lesson plans, and digital content for primary school curriculum, often for EdTech companies or publishers.

title: Educational Counsellor
description: A professional who works within educational settings to assist students with academic planning, personal development, and career choices.

title: Fashion Designer
description: Designs and creates original clothing, accessories, and footwear, from concept to final product, for various market segments.

title: Freelance Web Developer
description: An independent professional who builds and maintains websites and web applications for various clients on a project or contract basis.

title: GIS Analyst
description: A professional who uses Geographic Information Systems software to analyze and interpret spatial data for planning, environmental management, and other applications.

title: Graduate Engineer Trainee
description: An entry-level role for engineering graduates in private sector core engineering companies, involving a structured training program before being assigned to a specific department.

title: Graphic Designer
description: Creates visual concepts, using computer software or by hand, to communicate ideas that inspire, inform, and captivate consumers in various media like advertisements, brochures, and websites.

title: Hospital Sales Representative
description: A specialized sales role focused on selling pharmaceuticals or medical devices directly to hospitals, clinics, and large healthcare institutions.

title: Industrial Technician
description: A skilled professional who installs, maintains, and repairs industrial machinery and equipment in private sector factories, power plants, and construction sites.

title: Interior Designer
description: A professional who designs and supervises the execution of functional and aesthetic interior spaces for residential, commercial, or industrial buildings.

title: Investment Banker
description: A financial professional who specializes in raising capital for corporations and governments and provides strategic financial advisory services.

title: IT Officer in a Public Sector Undertaking (PSU)
description: A technical role in a government-owned enterprise responsible for managing and maintaining the organization's IT infrastructure and systems.

title: Junior Engineer
description: An entry-level engineering role in the private sector, assisting with design, development, and project execution under the supervision of a senior engineer.

title: Junior Engineer (PSU)
description: A permanent engineering role in a Public Sector Undertaking for diploma holders, focusing on operational tasks, maintenance, and project execution after a training period.

title: Lab Technician
description: An entry-level role involving conducting scientific tests, experiments, and analyses in a laboratory setting across industries like healthcare, research, and manufacturing.

title: Litigation Advocate
description: A lawyer who represents clients in civil or criminal proceedings in courts of law.

title: Maintenance Supervisor
description: A leadership role responsible for planning maintenance schedules, managing a team of technicians, and ensuring the operational efficiency of machinery.

title: Management Consultant
description: A professional who provides strategic and operational advice to businesses, governments, and other organizations to improve their performance.

title: Management Trainee
description: An entry-level corporate role for fresh graduates, involving training across various business functions before assignment to a specific department.

title: Marketing Manager
description: Oversees all marketing activities, both online and offline, for a company or product line, managing budgets, campaigns, and staff.

title: Medical Representative
description: A sales professional who promotes and sells medical products, primarily pharmaceuticals and equipment, from a company to various healthcare professionals.

title: Medical Science Liaison
description: A scientific professional who engages with leading physicians and researchers to provide in-depth medical and scientific information about a company's products.

title: Nursery Teacher
description: An educator specializing in early childhood education, working with children in pre-primary, nursery, or kindergarten settings.

title: Operation Theatre Technician
description: An allied healthcare professional who prepares and maintains operating theatres, assists the surgical team, and manages surgical instruments before, during, and after surgery.

title: Permanent Airman (Indian Air Force)
description: An Agniveer who has been selected for permanent commission in the Indian Air Force after completing their four-year tour of duty.

title: Permanent Sailor (Indian Navy)
description: A non-commissioned officer or sailor serving a full-term career in the Indian Navy after being selected from the Agniveer cadre.

title: Pharmacist
description: Dispenses medications and provides pharmaceutical care to patients in community or hospital settings, ensuring safe and effective drug use.

title: Physiotherapist
description: A healthcare professional who helps patients with physical difficulties resulting from illness, injury, disability or ageing to improve their movement and function.

title: Plantation Manager
description: Manages the daily operations of a large-scale farm or plantation, including crop production, financial management, and staff supervision.

title: Policy Analyst
description: A professional who researches and analyzes government policies, often for think tanks or consulting firms, using knowledge gained from civil services preparation.

title: Primary School Teacher (Private)
description: A teacher employed by a privately-owned school to teach students in primary classes (typically 1 to 5), often requiring D.El.Ed. qualification.

title: Private Tutor
description: An educator providing personalized academic instruction to elementary school students outside the formal school system.

title: Product Designer
description: Designs and develops physical products, from concept and prototyping to manufacturing, considering user needs, aesthetics, and functionality.

title: Product Manager
description: A professional responsible for a product's strategy, roadmap, and feature definition for an organization, often acting as a mini-CEO for the product.

title: Product Manager (Pharmaceuticals)
description: A marketing professional responsible for the strategy, promotion, and profitability of a specific pharmaceutical product or brand, often requiring an MBA.

title: Quality Control Analyst
description: A professional who tests products and materials in a manufacturing or production setting to ensure they meet quality and safety standards.

title: Radiographer
description: An allied healthcare professional who uses medical imaging equipment like X-rays, CT scans, and MRIs to create images of the body for diagnostic purposes.

title: Research Assistant
description: A role supporting scientists by preparing experiments, collecting and analyzing data, and maintaining lab records in academic or R&D settings.

title: Research Scientist in Private Sector (R&D)
description: A scientist working for a private company in industries like pharmaceuticals or biotechnology, where a NET qualification is a valuable credential.

title: Sailor (Merchant Navy)
description: A seafaring professional working on commercial vessels, responsible for the operation and maintenance of the ship, often requiring specific STCW certifications.

title: Sales Executive
description: An entry-level role responsible for selling products or services, managing client relationships, and meeting sales targets.

title: Scientist in a Government Research Organisation (CSIR, DRDO, etc.)
aliases: Research Scientist in a Public Sector Undertaking (PSU)
description: A research and development role in a government-funded organization, for which CSIR-NET scores are often used for shortlisting candidates.

title: Secondary School Teacher (Private)
description: A teacher in a private educational institution responsible for instructing students in one or more subjects at the secondary level, typically grades 6 through 10.

title: Senior Engineer
description: An experienced engineering role involving leading projects, mentoring junior engineers, and handling complex technical challenges in the private sector.

title: Senior Industrial Technician
description: An experienced technician responsible for complex troubleshooting, mentoring junior staff, and overseeing major repair and installation projects.

title: Senior Lab Technician
description: An experienced technician responsible for complex tests, training junior staff, and maintaining lab equipment and quality standards.

title: Senior Software Engineer
description: An experienced software developer who takes on more complex projects, mentors junior developers, and contributes to system architecture.

title: SEO Manager
description: Leads the search engine optimization strategy and team to increase a website's visibility and organic search results.

title: Service Manager
description: A professional responsible for managing a company's service operations, including maintenance, repairs, and customer support, often in manufacturing or engineering sectors.

title: Set Designer
description: A professional who designs and creates the sets for theatre, film, or television productions.

title: Social Media Manager
description: Manages a brand's online presence and campaigns on social media platforms to increase engagement and brand awareness.

title: Software Developer
description: An entry-level professional who designs, develops, tests, and maintains software applications and systems.

title: Sports Physiotherapist
description: A specialized physiotherapist who works with athletes and sports teams to prevent, diagnose, treat, and rehabilitate injuries related to sports and exercise.

title: Staff Nurse
description: A registered nurse providing direct patient care in clinical settings like hospitals, clinics, and long-term care facilities.

title: Systems Analyst
description: An IT professional who specializes in analyzing, designing, and implementing information systems to solve business problems.

title: Technician in Public Sector Undertaking (PSU)
description: A skilled technical role involving the maintenance, operation, and repair of machinery and equipment within a government-owned corporation like BHEL, SAIL, or NTPC.

title: UI/UX Designer
description: Designs user interfaces and experiences for websites, applications, and other digital products to ensure they are intuitive, accessible, and enjoyable for users.

title: Urban Planner
description: A professional who develops plans and programs for the use of land, helping create communities, accommodate population growth, and revitalize physical facilities in towns and cities.

title: Visual Merchandiser
description: A professional responsible for designing and creating attractive visual displays in retail outlets to attract customers and promote products.

title: Vocational Instructor (Private Institute)
description: An instructor teaching trade-specific skills at privately-owned Industrial Training Institutes (ITIs), vocational colleges, or corporate training centers.

title: Web Developer
description: A programmer who creates and maintains websites and web applications, working on either the front-end, back-end, or both (full-stack).

title: Class 10 (Secondary School)
description: Completion of secondary school (Class 10) under CBSE, ICSE, or a state board — the first major branching point in the Indian education system.

title: Arts & Humanities Stream (11th & 12th)
description: Senior-secondary humanities stream (History, Political Science, Psychology, Languages, etc.) leading toward BA, law, design, civil services, media and social sciences.

title: Commerce Stream (11th & 12th)
description: Senior-secondary commerce stream (Accountancy, Business Studies, Economics) leading toward B.Com, CA/CS/CMA, management, finance and law.

title: Science Stream — PCB (Physics, Chemistry, Biology)
description: Senior-secondary science stream with Physics, Chemistry and Biology; the standard route toward medicine, dentistry, pharmacy, nursing and life sciences.

title: Science Stream — PCM (Physics, Chemistry, Maths)
description: Senior-secondary science stream with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics; the standard route toward engineering, architecture, defence and quantitative fields.

title: Science Stream — PCMB (Physics, Chemistry, Maths, Biology)
description: Senior-secondary science stream keeping both Mathematics and Biology, preserving eligibility for both engineering and medical entrance exams.

title: Craft Instructor Training Scheme (CITS)
description: A one-year program to train ITI graduates as certified instructors for ITIs and other vocational training centers.

title: ITI (Industrial Training Institute)
description: Government-recognized vocational trade training (1-2 years) after Class 10 in trades like electrician, fitter, welder, COPA; leads to apprenticeships and skilled-trade employment.
